content: Leaflet marker performance: Each marker is a separate DOM element - performance degrades at hundreds of markers, becomes unusable at thousands. Solutions: (1) Leaflet.MarkerCluster - handles 50k points, but falters beyond 100k. (2) Supercluster - 500k markers in 1-2 seconds, best for large datasets. (3) Canvas rendering - faster rendering but harder to customize icons. (4) Viewport-based rendering - only show markers in current bounds. For a travel app with 10-50 stops/day per day of multi-day trip, MarkerCluster is sufficient but should be used from day 1 to avoid refactor.
